Package algorithms

Class SmartDijkstra

java.lang.Object
algorithms.SmartDijkstra
public class SmartDijkstra extends Object
Implements a modified Dijkstra algorithm optimized for student pathfinding with constraints such as budget, edge capacity, and multi-objective optimization (cost, time, distance).

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    SmartDijkstra.OptimizationWeights
    Encapsulates weighting parameters for cost, time, and distance.
    static class 
    SmartDijkstra.PathResult
    Encapsulates the result of a pathfinding operation.

  • Method Details

    • findOptimalPath

      public static SmartDijkstra.PathResult findOptimalPath(List<Node> nodes, Node start, Node destination, Student student, SmartDijkstra.OptimizationWeights weights)
      Finds the optimal path using a multi-objective Dijkstra algorithm.
      Parameters:
      nodes - List of all nodes in the graph
      start - Start node
      destination - Destination node
      student - Student with budget constraint
      weights - Optimization weights
      Returns:
      PathResult containing route and summary information

    • findOptimalPath

      public static SmartDijkstra.PathResult findOptimalPath(List<Node> nodes, Node start, Node destination, Student student, SmartDijkstra.OptimizationWeights weights, List<Node> animationCallback)
      Same as findOptimalPath but with animation sequence tracking.

    • findAlternativePaths

      public static List<SmartDijkstra.PathResult> findAlternativePaths(List<Node> nodes, Node start, Node destination, Student student, int maxAlternatives)
      Finds alternative optimized paths based on different optimization weights.
      Parameters:
      nodes - Graph nodes
      start - Start node
      destination - End node
      student - Student with constraints
      maxAlternatives - Max number of unique alternatives
      Returns:
      List of unique path alternatives

    • getDetailedPathInfo

      public static String getDetailedPathInfo(SmartDijkstra.PathResult pathResult)
      Formats detailed path information for printing.
      Parameters:
      pathResult - PathResult object
      Returns:
      String summary
